noUserDataPrinciples: The public GitHub Pages website has no account system, no upload form, no contact form, no analytics, no cookies, no wallet connection, and no payment collection.

Visitors must not submit personal data, confidential data, regulated data, credentials, private keys, health data, payment data, government IDs, minors' data, customer files, or third-party data through the public website.
Proof Mission requests must use only a non-sensitive business summary unless and until a separate written engagement and data-handling agreement exists.
The submitting party is responsible for rights, permissions, legal basis, redaction, accuracy, confidentiality, and compliance for any material it elects to provide outside the public site.
Public demos, receipts, and dockets are synthetic/public-safe and must not contain real customer or personal data.
permittedContact: Email may be used only for non-sensitive business inquiries and public-safe Proof Mission summaries.
